calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for small claims court trial.

Dept. 306; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:31:03 a.m. and concluding at 10:28:38 a.m.

Plaintiff Kenneth Mandler appearing in pro per.
Defendant City and County of San Francisco appearing by Remy Weiland (Claims Adjuster) and Zoe Grimaldi (Intern).

KENNETH MANDLER, REMY WEILAND, and ZOE GRIMALDI are placed under oath.

COURT DISCLOSURE
The Court and Plaintiff shared the same Architect, Cassandra Mettling-Davis. Court briefly confers with the parties regarding the extent of its dealing with Architect. This does not effect the Court's ability to be fare and impartial in this case. No objection by the parties, court trial proceeds.

Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - City and County of San Francisco Notice of Action upon Claim Nov-02-2022
Exhibit 2 - Photograph of Wedding Party
Exhibit 3 - Photograph of 466 Country Club Drive
Exhibit 4 - 2022 Aging and Disabilty Affordable Housing Needs Assessment Report dated 10/01/2022

Exhibit 5 - Article from San Francisco Chronicle dated 04/10/2023
Exhibit 6 - Article from San Francisco Chronicle dated 01/16/2023
Exhibit 7 - Article from San Francisco Chronicle dated 03/25/2023
Exhibit 8 - Article from San Francisco Chronicle dated 08/16/2018
Exhibit 9 - Photograph of Tree
Exhibit 10 - Photograph of Brooklyn Street at Night
Exhibit 11 - Photograph of Clay and Davis Streets, San Francisco March 2023
Exhibit 12 - Photograph of Mason and North Point Streets April 2023
Exhibit 13 - Letter to Matthew Rothschild dated 09/19/2022
Exhibit 14 - Accessory Dwelling Unit Handbook
Exhibit 16 - San Francisco Planning Code
Exhibit 17 - Article from San Francisco Chronicle dated 03/22/2023
Exhibit 18 - Ken Mandler's Small Claims Case Oral Presentation

Defendant testifies on its own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Claim Against City and County of San Francisco
Exhibit 2 - Plaintiff's Claim filed 02/27/2023
Exhibit 3 - Legislative Information
Exhibit 4 - Miller vs. Board of Public Works of City of Los Angeles
Exhibit 5 - Amendment of the Whole Bearing New Title, in Committee 03/29/2010
Exhibit 6 - Prepare for an Accessory Dwelling Unit
Exhibit 7 - Ministerial Definition and Legal Meaning

The matter is submitted.
Plaintiff's claim is DENIED.
Court finds in favor of Defendant.
Judgment entered.

EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE PARTIES IN OPEN COURT
